zh.lifeSummary: 當Joan of Lancaster於1312年2月26日出生在威爾士蒙姆爾格洛斯蒙特時，她的父親Henry of Lancaster 3rd Earl of Lancaster32歲，母親Maud de Chaworth30歲。她於1328年6月4日之前與John de Mowbray結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1349年7月7日在英國越可爾白藍德 艾比享年37歲，埋葬在英國越可爾白藍德 艾比。

nameMeanings.name: Joan
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Contracted form of Old French Jo(h)anne, from Latin Io(h)anna ( see Joanna ). In England this was the usual feminine form of John from the Middle English period onwards and was extremely popular, but in the 16th and 17th centuries it steadily lost ground to Jane . It was strongly revived in the first part of the 20th century, partly under the influence of George Bernard Shaw's play St Joan ( 1923 ), based on the life of Joan of Arc ( 1412–31 ). Claiming to be guided by the voices of the saints, she persuaded the French dauphin to defy the occupying English forces and have himself crowned, and she led the French army that raised the siege of Orleans in 1429 . The following year she was captured by the Burgundians and sold to the English, and a year later she was burned at the stake for witchcraft at the age of 18 or 19. Her story has captured the imagination of many writers, and she is variously portrayed as a national and political hero, a model of apolitical straightforwardness and honesty, and a religious heroine. She was canonized in 1920 . More recent influences have included the American film actress Joan Crawford ( 1908–77 , born Lucille le Sueur ), the British actress Joan Collins ( b. 1933 ), the American comedienne Joan Rivers ( b. 1933 ), and the West Indian pop singer Joan Armatrading ( b. 1950 ).

variants.name: John
meanings: Contracted form of Old French Jo(h)anne, from Latin Io(h)anna ( see Joanna ). In England this was the usual feminine form of John from the Middle English period onwards and was extremely popular, but in the 16th and 17th centuries it steadily lost ground to Jane . It was strongly revived in the first part of the 20th century, partly under the influence of George Bernard Shaw's play St Joan ( 1923 ), based on the life of Joan of Arc ( 1412–31 ). Claiming to be guided by the voices of the saints, she persuaded the French dauphin to defy the occupying English forces and have himself crowned, and she led the French army that raised the siege of Orleans in 1429 . The following year she was captured by the Burgundians and sold to the English, and a year later she was burned at the stake for witchcraft at the age of 18 or 19. Her story has captured the imagination of many writers, and she is variously portrayed as a national and political hero, a model of apolitical straightforwardness and honesty, and a religious heroine. She was canonized in 1920 . More recent influences have included the American film actress Joan Crawford ( 1908–77 , born Lucille le Sueur ), the British actress Joan Collins ( b. 1933 ), the American comedienne Joan Rivers ( b. 1933 ), and the West Indian pop singer Joan Armatrading ( b. 1950 ).

meanings: Short form of Oswald or any of the various other names beginning with Os-.

nameMeanings.name: Lancaster
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from Lancaster in northwestern England, which is recorded as Loncastre in 1086. The place takes its name from the river Lune + Old English ceaster ‘city, Roman fortification’ (from Latin castra ‘legionary camp’). The river name is probably British, perhaps related to Gaelic slán ‘healthy’, ‘salubrious’.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

en.lifeSummary: When Joan of Lancaster was born on 26 February 1312, in Grosmont, Monmouthshire, Wales, her father, Henry of Lancaster 3rd Earl of Lancaster, was 32 and her mother, Maud de Chaworth, was 30. She married John de Mowbray before 4 June 1328. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 2 daughters. She died on 7 July 1349, in Byland Abbey, Yorkshire, England, at the age of 37, and was buried in Byland Abbey, Yorkshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Joan of Lancaster est née le 26 février 1312, à Grosmont, Monmouthshire, Galles, son père, Henry of Lancaster 3rd Earl of Lancaster, avait 32 ans et sa mère, Maud de Chaworth, avait 30 ans. Elle a épousé John de Mowbray avant 4 juin 1328. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée le 7 juillet 1349, à Byland Abbey, Everwyck, Angleterre, à l’âge de 37 ans, et a été enterrée à Byland Abbey, Everwyck, Angleterre.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Joan of Lancaster è nata il il 26 febbraio 1312 nel Grosmont, Monmouthshire, Galles, sua padre, Henry of Lancaster 3rd Earl of Lancaster, aveva 32 anni e sua madre, Maud de Chaworth, aveva 30 anni. Lei sposato John de Mowbray prima del 4 giugno 1328. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 2 figlie. Morì il 7 luglio 1349, nel Byland Abbey, Yorkshire, England, all'età di 37 anni, e fu sepolta a Byland Abbey, Yorkshire, England.

ko.Leicester the Castle View, Leicestershir: 영국 레이스스터실르 레이스스터 테 카스틀 비w
ko.lifeSummary: Joan of Lancaster(이)가 1312년 2월 26일 웨일스 몬모우스실르 그로스몽에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Henry of Lancaster 3rd Earl of Lancaster(은)는 32세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Maud de Chaworth(은)는 30세였다. 그녀는 1328년 6월 4일 이전 John de Mowbray(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1349년 7월 7일 영국 요르크실르 빌랜드 애브브이에서 37세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 요르크실르 빌랜드 애브브이에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Joan of Lancaster nasceu em 26 de fevereiro de 1312, em Grosmont, Monmouthshire, Gales, seu pai, Henry of Lancaster 3rd Earl of Lancaster, tinha 32 anos e sua mãe, Maud de Chaworth, tinha 30 anos. ru.lifeSummary: Когда Joan of Lancaster родилась 26 февраля 1312 г. в местности гросмонт, монмоутшир, Уэльс, её отцу по имени Henry of Lancaster 3rd Earl of Lancaster было 32 года, а матери, которую звали Maud de Chaworth, 30. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени John de Mowbray перед 4 июнь 1328 г. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 2 дочери. Она умерла 7 июля 1349 г. в местности биланд эбби, еркшир, Англия в возрасте 37 лет и была похоронена в местности биланд эбби, еркшир, Англия.
